category_sources: Official Scala documentation at https://docs.scala-lang.org/ presents Scala as the Scala programming language.
display_name_sources: Official Scala homepage/docs use the display name Scala.
docs_sources: Official getting started and tour pages are documentation sections under docs.scala-lang.org.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has value https://github.com/scala/scala3, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a JVM-based programming language.
source_facts.executables lists scala, scalac, and scaladoc.
